name: guardrail-mcp
description: Stdlib-only Model Context Protocol server exposing the read-only Guardrail API as MCP tools, resources and prompts. Hub-ready for the CoinMarketCap Agent Hub / TWAK-style hosts.

GUARDRAIL_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the read-only Guardrail API the server proxies.

tools.name: guardrail_sweep
tools.description: Sentiment comparison sweep across fear/greed values (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_compile_policy
tools.description: Compile a natural-language mandate into a validated policy plus hash (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_indicators
tools.description: Deterministic synthetic indicators for a symbol (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_readiness
tools.description: Operational readiness probe for the agent (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_journal
tools.description: Decision journal: the agent's recent event log (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_scenarios
tools.description: Stress-scenario catalog and each scenario's expected risk response (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_skill_catalog
tools.description: List the 5 strategy skills (id, name, thesis): the 4 regime-complementary ensemble-core skills plus the standalone volatility-targeted-risk-parity sizing strategy (read-only).

tools.name: guardrail_ensemble_routing
tools.description: Resolve regime-routed ensemble weights: blend embedded per-skill weights for the live or specified regime. The ensemble core is the 4 regime-complementary skills; volatility-targeted-risk-parity is an additional standalone strategy (read-only).

resources.name: Agent skill descriptor
resources.description: Guardrail agent skill descriptor / capability catalog.

resources.name: Readiness probe
resources.description: Operational readiness probe for the agent.

resources.name: Regime ensemble config
resources.description: Embedded meta-allocator weights that blend the Track-2 strategy skills by market regime.

resources.name: Scenario catalog
resources.description: Committed stress-scenario catalog with each scenario's expected risk response.

resources.name: Skill catalog
resources.description: Full Track-2 strategy skill catalog: the 4 regime-complementary ensemble-core skills plus the standalone volatility-targeted-risk-parity sizing strategy.

prompts.name: analyze-regime
prompts.description: Analyze the current Guardrail market regime and its risk implications.

arguments.name: horizon
arguments.description: Time horizon for the analysis (e.g. 'the next 24h').

prompts.name: explain-decision
prompts.description: Explain a Guardrail agent decision with grounded evidence for a given audience.

arguments.name: decision
arguments.description: The decision to explain (e.g. 'reducing BTC exposure').

arguments.name: audience
arguments.description: Who the explanation is for (e.g. 'a risk committee').

prompts.name: draft-mandate
prompts.description: Draft a compilable natural-language Guardrail mandate from objective and risk inputs.

prompts.name: explain-ensemble-routing
prompts.description: Explain how the regime-routed ensemble blends the strategy skills for a given regime.

arguments.name: regime
arguments.description: Regime to explain (e.g. 'risk_on', 'risk_off', 'chop', 'breakout'). Defaults to the current regime.

arguments.name: audience
arguments.description: Who the explanation is for (e.g. 'a risk committee').

prompts.name: summarize-journal
prompts.description: Summarize the Guardrail decision journal (/events) into a timeline with decisions and follow-ups.

arguments.name: window
arguments.description: Which entries to cover (e.g. 'the last hour', 'today').
